leadText: Slush Rush (Japanese: ゆきかき Snow Removal) is an Ability introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a hailstorm or snow , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled. Unlike Sand Rush , Snow Cloak , and Sand Veil , a Pokémon with this Ability will take damage from the hailstorm unless it is Ice-type. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Slush Rush has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: In battle
sections.text: In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a hailstorm or snow , the Speed stat of Pokémon with this Ability is doubled. Unlike Sand Rush , Snow Cloak , and Sand Veil , a Pokémon with this Ability will take damage from the hailstorm unless it is Ice-type.
